title: VerdictRecord
description: One line of .claude/memory/verdict_log.jsonl -- a machine-logged reviewer/security-guard verdict, written by hooks/verdict_logger.py. Consumed by scripts/false_pass_rate.py.

ts.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of when the verdict was logged.

agent.description: Which agent issued the verdict. Only agents with a machine-parseable verdict format are covered -- see hooks/verdict_logger.py's honest-scope note.

verdict.description: LGTM/PASS = pass-class (the thing scripts/false_pass_rate.py measures against); NEEDS_WORK/BLOCK = fail-class, not counted as a pass to falsify.

git_head.description: git rev-parse HEAD at the moment the verdict was logged. Null if not resolvable (e.g. not a git repo, detached weirdness).

files.description: Best-effort union of the last commit's changed files and the current working-tree diff -- the verdict could be about either.
